subcodes.first_line: O Lord of existence and Sovereign of the unseen and the seen! Aid those who bow down in worship to raise up the foundations of this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب الوجود و ملیک الغیب و الشهود اید اهل السجود علی رفع القواعد من هذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @education of children; moral education
